news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Tara India Opportunities ETF (IOPP)
Simplify Teams With India Experts at System Two Advisors to Launch the Actively Managed Simplify Tara India Opportunities ETF (IOPP)

holdings.infoBox: IOPP is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are BAJAJ AUTO LTD INR 10.0 stock at 5.75%, Eternal at 5.73%, Craftsman Automation at 5.64%, Avenue Supermarts at 5.20%, and The Indian Hotels Company at 5.16%.

overview.description: The Simplify Tara India Opportunities ETF (IOPP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in Indian equity securities of any market capitalization. The fund targets companies that are expected to benefit from the broad themes capturing Indias growth story. IOPP was launched on Mar 4, 2024 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Teams With India Experts at System Two Advisors to Launch the Actively Managed Simplify Tara India Opportunities ETF (IOPP)
data.text: India-focused indexes tend to overweight large, globally-oriented firms, missing the companies more closely tied to the key drivers of Indian economic growth
